context: Tests whether SwiftLint rollout guidance uses baselines for existing violations, strict CI for new violations, and targeted suppression/configuration policies.

checklist.name: Baseline creation
checklist.description: Creates an initial baseline with `swiftlint --write-baseline` or `write_baseline` and says to commit it for incremental adoption.

checklist.name: Baseline CI enforcement
checklist.description: Runs CI with `--baseline` and `--strict` or equivalent configuration so only new violations fail the build.

checklist.name: Baseline burn-down
checklist.description: Recommends reducing the baseline over time by fixing legacy violations and regenerating the baseline in cleanup PRs.

checklist.name: Targeted suppressions
checklist.description: Recommends targeted `swiftlint:disable` suppressions with reasons and avoids blanket `all` suppressions except as a last resort.

checklist.name: Generated code exclusion
checklist.description: Prefers `.swiftlint.yml` `excluded` paths for generated or vendored code rather than inline disables.

checklist.name: Tests stay linted
checklist.description: Recommends a relaxed child `.swiftlint.yml` for tests instead of excluding the whole test suite.
